result.summary: solo.io publicly documents three CLIs—glooctl, meshctl, and agctl—and product API/CRD references, but I could not verify any public vendor-hosted HTTP, GraphQL, or MCP integration endpoints on solo.io itself from the available docs.
result.description: Solo.io builds enterprise and open-source products for API gateways, service mesh, and AI agent infrastructure on Kubernetes. Its product line includes kgateway, Istio Enterprise, agentgateway, kagent, and agentregistry.
